name: Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile customer billing data with CRM records instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inconsistencies between billing data and CRM records
features: Manual data entry for billing records
